# benchmark.setup { #tspaint.benchmark.setup }

```python
tspaint.benchmark.setup(
    tools=None,
    *,
    tools_dir=None,
    manifest=None,
    force=False,
    dry_run=False,
    log=print,
)
```

Clone + build the git-only comparators listed in the manifest.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**tools**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[str](`str`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Subset of tool names to provision; default all in the manifest.

<code>[**tools_dir**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Clone root (default :func:`default_tools_dir`).

<code>[**manifest**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Manifest path (default :func:`default_manifest_path`).

<code>[**force**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Re-provision even if the ``check`` path already exists.

<code>[**dry_run**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [False]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Print the plan and make no changes.

<code>[**log**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[callable](`callable`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [print]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Progress sink (default ``print``).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[list](`list`)\[[dict](`dict`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   One row per tool: ``tool``, ``status`` (``already`` / ``planned`` / ``provisioned`` / ``incomplete`` / ``failed`` / ``unknown``), ``path`` and the ``steps`` (formatted).
